articles.title: The 'big brother' helping Arteta's Arsenal 'over the line'
articles.summary: As Arsenal pursue a first Premier League title in 22 years, BBC Sport looks at how the relationship between Mikel Arteta and his assistant, Gabriel Heinze, is helping them.

articles.title: Uefa fears impact of Premier League spending rules
articles.summary: Uefa is seriously concerned that the Premier League's new financial rules could further impact competitive balance.

articles.title: Is O'Neill's points average enough to win title?
articles.summary: What do the points average of those in charge of the top four in the Scottish Premiership tell us about who may win the title?

articles.title: How Newcastle United are plotting a course to the WSL
articles.summary: Newcastle United have risen from the fourth tier to the fringe of the Women's Super League - BBC Sport looks at how they've done it.

articles.title: Regulator proposals 'put diversity on subs bench' - Kick It Out
articles.summary: The head of anti-discrimination body Kick It Out says that initial proposals by English football's independent regulator "put equality, diversity and inclusion  on the subs bench".

articles.title: Eze stunner features in best goals of FA Cup fifth round
articles.summary: Eberechi Eze's stunning winner for Arsenal against Mansfield and Andy Robertson's fine strike for Liverpool feature in the best of goals of the FA Cup fifth round.

articles.title: Quiz: One question for each team in the Champions League last 16
articles.summary: The Champions League is back, but how much do you know about each of the 16 teams still in the competition?

articles.title: Five Iranian footballers granted Australian visas after anthem protest
articles.summary: Concern has grown for team after one critic called them "wartime traitors" for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem.

articles.title: Man City host Liverpool, Port Vale face Chelsea - full FA Cup draw
articles.summary: League One Port Vale's reward for beating Sunderland in the FA Cup is a quarter-final tie away to Chelsea, while Manchester City will host Liverpool in a heavyweight showdown.

articles.title: Alisson injury not 'a big thing' despite missing Galatasaray
articles.summary: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson is ruled out of the first leg of their Champions League tie against Galatasaray through injury - but could return to face Tottenham at the weekend.

articles.title: Juve want Tottenham's Spence - Tuesday's gossip
articles.summary: Tottenham's Djed Spence a target for Juventus, Real Madrid put Mauricio Pochettino on managerial shortlist, Liverpool consider move for French winger Moussa Diaby, plus more.

articles.title: Mourinho sent off after late Benfica equaliser
articles.summary: Benfica manager Jose Mourinho is shown a red card following an altercation between the benches after his side score a late equaliser against his former club FC Porto.

articles.title: Is time-wasting in the Premier League getting worse?
articles.summary: With time-wasting seemingly on the rise in the Premier League, how bad is it getting, are fans receiving value for money and what is being done about it?

articles.title: Premier League survival is Spurs' priority - Tudor
articles.summary: Tottenham Hotspur will prioritise earning Premier League survival over Champions League progress, says interim manager Igor Tudor.

articles.title: MLS hands life bans to Yeboah & Jones for betting offences
articles.summary: Major League Soccer gives lifetime bans to midfielder Derrick Jones and winger Yaw Yeboah for betting offences.

articles.summary: Watch the best of the action from the weekend's action in the Scottish Championship, League 1 and League 2.

articles.title: Every televised ACE at Players Championship's iconic 17th hole!
articles.summary: Ahead of the 2026 Players Championship at TPC Sawgrass, we take a look at every televised hole-in-one at the iconic 17th hole, one of the most famous holes on the PGA Tour.

articles.title: 'That is UNREAL!' | McIlroy's best shots from his 2025 Players win!
articles.summary: Watch Rory McIlroy's best shots from his 2025 Players Championship win as he looks to defend his title this week at TPC Sawgrass.

articles.title: Leeds ease past Norwich to reach FA Cup quarter-finals
articles.summary: Leeds reach the FA Cup quarter-finals for the first time in over 20 years, after comfortably beating Championship side Norwich 3-0 at Elland Road.

articles.title: Nolan sacked as Northampton boss after poor run
articles.summary: Northampton Town sack manager Kevin Nolan after a run of one win in 16 games with the club in the League One relegation places.

articles.title: Scotland fire seven past Luxembourg in World Cup qualifying
articles.summary: Watch as Scotland beat Luxembourg 7-0 in their Women's World Cup qualifier at Hampden Park to go top of Group B4 ahead of Belgium on goal difference.
